title: CSA Loom Copilot golden eval row
description: One JSON object per JSONL line in content/evals/<surface>.jsonl. Every expectedChunks entry must resolve to a real corpus doc path (+ optional heading anchor) — scripts/csa-loom/lint-eval-sets.mjs enforces this against the docs tree and, where available, apps/fiab-console/copilot-corpus/.corpus-manifest.json.

id.description: Unique row id: '<surface>-<NNN>' (surface = the JSONL basename).

question.description: The user question posed to the Copilot surface.

expectedChunks.description: Corpus doc paths (repo-root-relative, optionally '#<heading-anchor>') the retriever SHOULD surface. Scored as hit-rate + MRR by the E2 evaluator.

expectedAnswer.description: The grounded reference answer, reflecting the ACTUAL product (Azure-native by default; Fabric strictly opt-in). Fed to the LLM judge as the gold answer.

mustMention.description: Deterministic grounding guard: case-insensitive substrings the answer MUST contain. Checked BEFORE the LLM judge.

mustNotMention.description: Deterministic anti-hallucination guard: case-insensitive substrings the answer must NOT contain. Encodes the no-fabric-dependency + no-vaporware rules as assertions (e.g. 'requires a Fabric capacity'). A hit = auto-fail, no judge spend.

tier.description: Expected model tier from lib/foundry/model-tier-router.ts ModelTier.

taskClass.description: Expected task class from lib/foundry/model-tier-router.ts TaskClass (feeds the E6 tier-accuracy set).
